advancements.shroomhearth_guide.a_cut_ab: Craft alternate materials with a Stonecutter
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.arcane_a: Apply a Rune to an item
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.beyond_t: Use a Hyphal Knot to grow the World Border
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.bottle_b: Catch an Allay in a Bottle
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.corrosiv: Craft any copper block with Magma Cream to oxidize it
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.exotic_w: Complete an unusual trade with the Wandering Trader
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.forbidde: Use an Ender Tome to overlevel an enchantment on an item
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.friendly: Find a Harmony Cap nearby other Players
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.homeboun: Use your Echo Horn to teleport to your respawn point
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.in_this_: Collect a Spawn Egg from a Spawner
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.mob_zapp: Place an End Crystal to block certain monsters from spawning
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.reanimat: Kill a Wither Skeleton that has been summoned by a Wither
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.resonant: Eat an Echo Kernel to teleport to its origin
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.root.des: Learn about the unique features and mechanics of Shroomhearth
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.slumber_: Sleep while other Players are in the Overworld to advance the night quickly
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.soulboun: Use another Player's Echo Horn to teleport to them
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.spontane: Find and eat an Enchanted Golden Chorus Fruit to teleport somewhere within the World Border
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.spore_ba: Use a Spore Bottle to start a Spores event
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.tug_of_w: Use a Fishing Rod to hook an Echo Shard off of a Warden
advancements.shroomhearth_guide.well_tra: Gain movement speed while sprinting or riding a saddled mob on Dirt Path or Frosted Ice blocks
advancements.shroomhearth_stories.root.d: Discover the world's locations and stories
advancements.stories.petrichor_pond.petr: Catch a Petri Pfish from the Tides of Tesselation waters of Petrichor Pond
Win any fishing tournament category at Petrichor Pond
arena.tooltip: Arenas are zones where PvP is encouraged. Inside an Arena, Players will accumulate Harmony from fighting each other and drop their heads upon death. Arena K/D can be viewed at the World Hall.
community:cannot_create_permit: You cannot create a Living Island Permit right now
community:cannot_create_permit.tooltip: A Charm and Paper are required to create a Living Island Permit
event.shroomhearth.spores_of_haste.toolt: Applies +10%% Attack Speed and +20%% Block Break Speed to all Players
haberdasher.cannot_fill_head: You cannot paint a head right now
haberdasher.cannot_fill_head.tooltip: One level of experience and a player or mob head are needed to paint a head
harmony.spores.disable_cramming.tooltip: Prevents entities from taking cramming damage
harmony.spores.disable_fall_damage.toolt: Prevents Players from taking fall damage
harmony.spores.egg_hunt.tooltip: Rabbits drop a Painted Egg after eating Carrots
harmony.spores.fire_resistance.tooltip: Applies the Fire Resistance effect to all Players
harmony.spores.haste.tooltip: Applies +10%% Attack Speed and +20%% Block Break Speed to all Players
harmony.spores.health.tooltip: Applies +4 Max Health to all Players
harmony.spores.horsepower.tooltip: Mounts receive Speed, Jump Boost, and Slow Falling effects while being ridden and receive the Levitation effect while looking upwards.
harmony.spores.keeping.tooltip: Enables the Keep Inventory game rule
harmony.spores.leaping.tooltip: Applies +1 Safe Fall Distance and +0.1 Jump Strength to all Players
harmony.spores.night_vision.tooltip: Applies the Night Vision effect to all Players
harmony.spores.regeneration.tooltip: Applies the Regeneration effect to all Players
harmony.spores.resistance.tooltip: Applies the Resistance effect to all Players
harmony.spores.strength.tooltip: Applies +3 Attack Damage to all Players
harmony.spores.water_breathing.tooltip: Applies the Water Breathing effect to all Players
item.shroomhearth.porcelain_amphora.miss: Your Porcelain Amphora could not be found

item.shroomhearth.porcelain_amphora.too_: You may not enter The Porcelain here, another Porcelain Amphora is too close

recall.cannot_procure_whistle: You cannot procure a Recall Whistle right now
recall.cannot_procure_whistle_tooltip: A Netherite Ingot is required to procure a Recall Whistle
wilderness.tooltip: The Wilderness is part of the world that is marked to be reset for future Minecraft updates. Anything built in The Wilderness may eventually be lost.
world_hall.cannot_print_lore: You cannot print lore onto an item right now
world_hall.cannot_print_lore.tooltip: One level of experience is required to print lore onto an item
